title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 141.360 - Suits for foreclosure — naming of parties
text:
141.360.  Suits for foreclosure — naming of parties. — All suits for the foreclosure of tax liens brought by the collector shall name the collector only by the title of the collector's office and all such suits shall be brought directly against the real estate subject to the tax lien or liens to be foreclosed.
(L. 1943 p. 1029 § 11, A.L. 2024 H.B. 2062)
